title: チューリップ賞の後に・猛りを抱く

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaah! I can't believe I didn't win!
choice_data_list: But you still qualified for the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So what?! I wanted to get first!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This isn't nearly enough! Next time I'm going to
get the gold for sure!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But there's no fun in just beating her once. I need
to totally wipe the floor with her!
choice_data_list: You push yourself really hard, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Because I have to! Why is my own trainer babying
me so much?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You should be angrier! More frustrated! More
determined never to let anyone else steal the
number one spot again!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We need to start training as soon as we're back!
I'm going to iron out every last wrinkle!
